frontmatter.description: Tooling can be tricky sometimes; be careful.

asset.body:
Tools are sometimes tricky.

Be careful when using them.

If something breaks, try again or ask someone.

feedback.reason: Not actionable — does not say which tools, what to be careful of, or who to ask
feedback.note: Reads like a placeholder; provides zero retrieval value.

feedback.reason: Pulled into a retrieval for `deploy tooling` and was useless

humanGrade.rationale: Vacuous content (`be careful`, `ask someone`) with no specifics. A calibrated judge should score this under 2.5 and emit `quality_rejected`. Two unambiguous negatives reinforce the signal.
